title: Apex Protocol – An open MCP-based standard for AI agent trading
content: Open MCP-based standard for AI agent trading

title: Show HN: I built a tiny LLM to demystify how language models work
content: 9M parameter LLM with 60K synthetic conversations, ~130 lines of PyTorch, trains in 5 minutes on free Colab

title: Show HN: Gemma Gem – AI model embedded in a browser – no API keys, no cloud
content: Chrome extension loading Google's Gemma 4 (2B) via WebGPU with tools to interact with webpages, read content, take screenshots, and execute JavaScript

title: Gemma 4 on iPhone
content: Google's Gemma 4 language model available as iPhone application

title: OpenAI's fall from grace as investors race to Anthropic
content: Capital shifts from OpenAI toward Anthropic amid competitive dynamics in AI development

title: Copilot is 'for entertainment purposes only,' according to Microsoft's terms of use
content: AI skeptics aren't the only ones warning users not to unthinkingly trust models' outputs — that's what the AI companies say themselves in their terms of service.

title: In Japan, the robot isn't coming for your job; it's filling the one nobody wants
content: Driven by labor shortages, Japan is pushing physical AI from pilot projects into real-world deployment.

title: Anthropic says Claude Code subscribers will need to pay extra for OpenClaw usage
content: It's about to become more expensive for Claude Code subscribers to use Anthropic's coding assistant with OpenClaw and other third-party tools.

title: Anthropic buys biotech startup Coefficient Bio in $400M deal
content: Anthropic has purchased the stealth biotech AI startup Coefficient Bio in a $400 million stock deal.

title: Microsoft takes on AI rivals with three new foundational models
content: MAI released models that can transcribe voice into text as well as generate audio and images after the group's formation six months ago.

title: Google now lets you direct avatars through prompts in its Vids app
content: Google is adding a way to customize and instruct avatars for video creation in the Vids app.

title: The Facebook insider building content moderation for the AI era
content: Moonbounce has raised $12 million to grow its AI control engine that converts content moderation policies into consistent, predictable AI behavior.

title: AI companies are building huge natural gas plants to power data centers
content: Meta, Microsoft, and Google are all betting big on new natural gas power plants to run their AI data centers. They may regret it.
